titles.title: Let The Redeemed Of The Lord Say So

authors.author: Aus der Bibel
Charles Slagle
All die Erlösten des Herrn, seid froh

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let the redeemed of the Lord say so Let the redeemed of the Lord say so Let the redeemed of the Lord say so I'm redeemed I'm redeemed Praise the Lord
